statement: In every magma, Equation 688 (`x = y * (x * ((z * x) * z))`) implies Equation 3470 (`x * x = x * ((y * z) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0876
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op x (op (op z x) z)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op x (op (op y z) w))
